title: Laplace warehouse config (Contract A)
description: Complete specification of one simulated warehouse. CONVENTIONS: distances in meters, times in minutes, rates per minute, speeds in m/s. Node naming: 'A{aisle}_{position}' where aisle is 1-indexed and position is integer meters along the aisle (e.g. 'A3_15'). Edge naming: '{from_node}->{to_node}'. All randomness in a rollout derives from the run seed, NOT from this config. A config plus a seed fully determines a trajectory.

grid.description: Base topology: parallel aisles connected by cross-aisles. Generated nodes sit at 1 m intervals along each aisle; cross-aisles connect equal positions across all aisles.

aisle_spacing_m.description: Center-to-center distance (m) between adjacent aisles. Sets the LENGTH of cross-aisle and extra edges and the node x-coordinates (nodes still sit at 1 m intervals ALONG each aisle). OPTIONAL: when omitted the simulator uses its 3.0 m convention. Set from a scanned real footprint (facility/usd_extractor) to make cross-aisle travel time, battery drain, routing, and congestion geometrically faithful. Intentionally NOT default-filled: omitting it keeps a config byte-identical (and hash-identical) to the pre-field canonical form.

cross_aisles.description: Positions (meters along aisle) where cross-aisles exist. Must include both ends in most scenarios.

extra_edges.description: Edges added beyond the grid (e.g. a shortcut). THIS IS THE BRAESS LEVER.

edge_overrides.description: Per-edge capacity / direction / speed overrides. Default edge: capacity 2, bidirectional, max_speed = fleet speed.

capacity.description: Max simultaneous AMRs on the edge; entrants beyond capacity queue at the tail node.

one_way.description: If true, traversal allowed only in the edge's stated from->to direction.

battery_capacity_m.description: Meters of travel per full charge. AMR seeks charge below 15% remaining; charging restores full capacity in charge_minutes.

routing.description: congestion_aware: edge cost = length * (1 + congestion_penalty * current_occupancy/capacity); congestion_penalty defaults to 2.0 (see below).

dispatch.description: Task-allocation rule (which idle AMR gets the next order). OPTIONAL and intentionally NOT default-filled: omitting it keeps a config byte-identical (hash-identical) and the simulator uses the frozen-v1 'nearest_idle'. Agent-controllable (policy SELECTION only; objective weights stay scenario-fixed). atc/covert are composite dispatching rules; deterministic, no added randomness.

congestion_penalty.description: Edge-cost congestion multiplier for routing=='congestion_aware'. OPTIONAL, NOT default-filled; absent -> 2.0 (the frozen-v1 constant), preserving config_hash.

charge_threshold_pct.description: Battery fraction below which an idle AMR seeks charge. OPTIONAL, NOT default-filled; absent -> 0.15 (the frozen-v1 constant), preserving config_hash.

arrival_rate_per_min.description: Poisson order arrivals. Each order: pick at uniformly random pick station -> deliver to a pack station per pack_assignment.

warmup_minutes.description: Events before warmup end are simulated but EXCLUDED from all metrics.

slots.description: Parallel service slots; AMRs beyond slots queue FIFO at the node.

service_lognorm.description: [mu, sigma] of ln(service_minutes). Mean service time = exp(mu + sigma^2/2). THE VARIANCE-TRAP LEVER.
